findings.problem: The reported 0.94 AUC is computed on the same 200 scans used to tune the threshold; there is no held-out test set.
findings.why: Threshold tuning on the evaluation data leaks label information and inflates AUC; the headline result is not trustworthy.
findings.fix: Report AUC on a pre-registered external or temporally split test set never seen during tuning; move the current number to 'internal validation'.

findings.why: Readers cannot interpret the effect magnitude.

findings.problem: Claims 'first to show X' but Zhang 2023 reported the same finding.
findings.fix: Soften to 'among the first' and cite Zhang 2023.
findings.evidence: Zhang et al. 2023, Radiology, doi:10.1148/xyz reports the same X in their Table 2.
